channel.title: Java Service Management on Dennys Diary

item.title: Java RESTful service
item.description:
1. Service
  2. Document (Swagger)
  3. Validation
  4. Authentication
  5. Authorizatio
  6. Log
  7. Test
  8. Stress test
  9. Auto test, mock, …
  10. Management – supervisor – Python vs Golang
  11. Monitor – Grafana
  12. Monitor – OpenTelemetry, Jaeger,
